items.title: Oil prices drop and stock markets rise after reports of deal to end Iran war
items.summary: Reports have raised hopes of an agreement between the US and Iran after days of escalation.

items.title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
items.summary: A new scientific analysis of the event shows tiny earthquakes triggered a massive landslide.

items.title: German police raid neo-Nazi criminal youth groups
items.summary: Police search locations in 12 states, mainly in the East and South of the country in what prosecutors say is a targeted raid.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普拋和平橄欖枝：若伊朗同意協議 美伊戰爭有望結束
items.summary: 美國總統川普今（6）日發文說，若伊朗同意履行已達成的協議，美伊戰爭可望落幕，而荷姆茲海峽也有望重新開放，但他也警告，若伊朗不願妥協，那美國會發動比先前更猛烈的轟炸行動。  川...…
